title: Lastrea affinis
taxonomy: Lastrea affinis is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to China and Southeast Asia. This species is classified under the genus Lastrea, which is a group of ferns that are often characterized by their delicate fronds and slender stalks. The family Dryopteridaceae is a large group of ferns that are commonly known as wood ferns or shield ferns. This classification places Lastrea affinis within the larger group of ferns that are native to tropical and subtropical regions.
